# Journal: 2026-04-14

## Summary

Built filter panel components and skeleton loader. Wrote unit tests. Figma spec finalized by design team.

## Work Done

- Implemented CampaignFilterPanel with status, dateFrom, dateTo, projectId filters.
- Added debounce (300ms) to filter change handlers using useDebouncedValue hook.
- Built CampaignDateRangePicker component using react-day-picker (already in dependency tree).
- Added CampaignProjectDropdown with search using existing ProjectSearchInput component.
- Implemented SkeletonCampaignRow component — submitted to shared UI library PR.
- Implemented CampaignEmptyState component with "Create Campaign" CTA button.
- Wrote 12 unit tests for useCampaignList hook covering: initial load, next page, filter change, error state.
- Wrote 8 unit tests for URL sync: filter params encode/decode, partial params, invalid params.
- Set up Storybook stories for SkeletonCampaignRow and CampaignEmptyState.
- Reviewed Figma spec (finalized 2026-04-14 by @ux-lead) — minor spacing adjustments needed.
- Applied spacing adjustments from Figma review.

## Decisions

- SkeletonCampaignRow uses CSS animation (not Framer Motion) — lighter weight.
- Empty state CTA links to /campaigns/new (existing route, no new route needed).
- Debounce 300ms confirmed correct after manual testing on slow 3G throttle profile.

## Blockers

- Keyboard navigation for date range picker still unsolved — no existing ARIA pattern found in codebase.
- /v2/campaigns still 404 in staging — mocking API responses with MSW for unit tests.

## Next

- Fix keyboard navigation for date range picker (a11y requirement).
- Implement scroll position preservation on back navigation.
- Write E2E tests for pagination and filter flows.
- Measure TTI on 3G throttle with Chrome DevTools.
- Address skeleton component PR review feedback.

## Notes

- MSW mock for /v2/campaigns is in src/mocks/handlers/campaigns.ts.
- Storybook stories are in src/stories/CampaignList.stories.tsx.
